name: Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Transformer (params undisclosed), cost-optimized 2.0 tier
note: First Flash-Lite tier; single-rate pricing and cost-optimized successor to 1.5 Flash for large-scale text output.

results.notes: World knowledge factuality with no search enabled, Public Preview column of the official Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite model card evaluation table.
FACTS Grounding benchmark, Public Preview column of the official model card evaluation table.
Bird-SQL (Dev) text-to-SQL benchmark, Public Preview column of the official model card evaluation table.

Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite column, Table 3 of the Gemini 2.5 Technical Report ('Gemini 2.5: Pushing the Frontier...'), pass-rate average of 3 trials per Aider leaderboard methodology. This is a later/GA-era measurement than the Feb 2025 Public Preview snapshot already tracked for this model's other benchmarks -- flagged here to avoid conflating the two snapshots.

SWE-Bench Verified, single attempt, Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite column, Table 3 of the Gemini 2.5 Technical Report (23.1% with multiple attempts). Same later/GA-era snapshot caveat as the Aider Polyglot addition for this model.

Humanity's Last Exam, no tools, Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite column, Table 3 of the Gemini 2.5 Technical Report. The report explicitly flags this figure (marked with dagger) as measured on an earlier HLE dataset revision than the 2.5-generation scores.
Global MMLU (Lite), Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite column, Table 3 of the Gemini 2.5 Technical Report. Same later/GA-era snapshot caveat as the Aider Polyglot addition for this model.
AIME 2025, Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite column, Table 3 of the Gemini 2.5 Technical Report. Same later/GA-era snapshot caveat as the Aider Polyglot addition for this model.

verificationNotes: Release as public preview on Feb 5 2025 confirmed via blog.google Feb 2025 model updates post. Fetched Gemini-2.0-Flash-Lite-Model-Card.pdf (published Apr 10 2025) and confirmed all 5 benchmark rows match the Public Preview column verbatim: MMLU-Pro 71.6%, GPQA diamond 51.5%, MATH 86.8%, MMMU 68.0%, LiveCodeBench v5 28.9%. Pricing $0.075/$0.30 per 1M tokens confirmed via search of ai.google.dev pricing coverage. No changes made.
